evals.prompt: Triage GitHub issue #8 for this repository and apply the appropriate readiness label.
evals.expected_output: Fetches the issue and available labels, inspects the current checkout and related open issues, chooses exactly one readiness state, applies the matching tracker label, and reports the rationale.

evals.prompt: Please triage ENG-142 from Jira. Decide whether an agent should implement it now, spec it first, ask for more details, or wait.
evals.expected_output: Uses an available Jira integration to fetch the full issue and labels, analyzes relevant code and open issues, applies exactly one semantically matching readiness label, and reports concrete next steps.

evals.prompt: Assess this Linear issue for implementation readiness: https://linear.app/example/issue/APP-321/new-image-export-flow
evals.expected_output: Fetches Linear issue context and existing labels, evaluates product cohesion and implementation ambiguity against the codebase, applies exactly one readiness label, and summarizes the evidence.
